source.title: Protocols for Cognitive Task Analysis
source.publisher: Florida Institute for Human and Machine Cognition

extraction.dtic_edition_method: Internet Archive full-document OCR text paired with the archived DTIC PDF
extraction.author_hosted_edition_method: pdftotext 25.06.0 with layout preservation over the author-hosted text PDF
verified_regions: title, attribution, and report metadata at both extractions' starts
workplace analysis and observation protocols in the DTIC edition middle
SOP forms and templates in the author-hosted edition middle
extraction.edition_notes: The archived DTIC accession is the May 2005, 109-PDF-page edition attributed principally to Hoffman. The current IHMC-hosted file is an expanded 2008, 135-page edition with Crandall, Klein, Jones, and Endsley explicitly credited; both are retained so later review can distinguish edition-specific guidance.
extraction.quality_notes: The DTIC OCR inserts spaces and flattens tables. The author-hosted extraction is cleaner and preserves page breaks/layout, though tables remain plain text. Important claims should be checked against the corresponding PDF edition.
extraction.source_access_notes: DTIC's PDF endpoint returned HTTP 429 after retries. The accession edition was acquired from the Internet Archive DTIC mirror and the expanded edition from IHMC. Sampled beginning/middle/end content and page counts were verified. These artifacts are source evidence, not a deep review.
